action_set_definitions.name: get_market_snapshot
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current environmental state variables including current_price, inventory_level, competitor_price, market_demand_index, unit_cost, and cumulative_profit. This is the primary observation tool.

action_set_definitions.name: set_selling_price
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the product's selling price for the upcoming cycle. The price must be at least 20% above unit_cost and no more than 115% of the competitor_price.

action_set_definitions.name: order_inventory_restock
action_set_definitions.description: Orders additional units to be added to the inventory immediately before the cycle transition.

quantity.description: The number of units to order and add to stock.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_cycle
action_set_definitions.description: Signals the end of the current decision cycle. The environment processes sales based on the price and demand, updates the state, and moves to the next time step (t+1).

state_description.current_price: The current selling price of the product.
state_description.inventory_level: The number of units currently available in stock.
state_description.competitor_price: The average price of the product offered by primary competitors.
state_description.market_demand_index: A multiplier (0.0 to 2.0) representing current market interest/seasonality.
state_description.unit_cost: The fixed cost to the business for acquiring or producing one unit.
state_description.cumulative_profit: The total profit generated since the start of the simulation.
